items.desc: Társasjáték Boldog lazac: An addictive game you'll want to play all the timeHappy Salmon is a fast and loud movement game that will have you laughing in less than two minutes. This game with simple rules is designed for…
items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Boldog lazac:                An addictive game you'll want to play all the timeHappy Salmon is a fast and loud movement game that will have you laughing in less than two minutes. This game with simple rules is designed for the whole family and is great as a fun game for kids, school trips, camps, but also as a party game for adults. Players turn over their card, shout out what is on it and try to find the opponent whose card shows the same picture as quickly as possible. Once they find it, they must perform the action shown, then they can put the card down and continue playing. The object of the game is to get rid of all your cards first.  As a challenge, it is also possible to try the TICHOU variant of the Lucky Salmon game. One game of this game lasts only 90 seconds. The Lucky Salmon card game is designed for 3-8 players aged 6 and up.                             6+        recommended age                                3-8 players        number of players                                90 s        length of one game...

items.desc: Pulzoximéter Contec CMS50D: The Contec CMS50D oximeter is suitable for use at home, on the road and in medical facilities. It is intended for non-invasive measurement of hemoglobin oxygen saturation, in the arethral par…
items.raw_desc: Pulzoximéter Contec CMS50D:        The Contec CMS50D oximeter is suitable for use at home, on the road and in medical facilities. It is intended for non-invasive measurement of hemoglobin oxygen saturation, in the arethral part of the bloodstream, and heart rate. It is a suitable tool for asthmatics, people with heart disease, but also athletes and those who move at great heights. To measure, it uses two light rays with different wavelengths, which fall on a finger inserted into the device. It measures the saturation of the blood with oxygen in the range of 0-100% and the heart rate in the range of 30-235 beats per minute. items.raw_desc: Sütőalátét Lékué Mikroperforált sütőalátét, 40 × 30 cm, barna:Szeretnéd, ha a receptjeid egyenletesen és szép ropogósra sülnének? Akkor ez az alátét neked való. Ez a mikroperforált sütőszőnyeg apró lyukakkal van ellátva az egész felületén, amelyek egyenletes hőeloszlást biztosítanak a sütés során, és kiszűrik a vizet a tésztából, így hihetetlenül ropogós lesz a recepted. A platina szilikon alátét kétoldalas nyomtatással rendelkezik, amely lehetővé teszi, hogy az egyik oldalon ízletes éclairs-t, a másikon pedig sós és édes chouquette-eket készíts. Lepd meg vendégeid a Lékué receptjeivel! A speciális utasítások ellenére ez a platina szilikonszőnyeg bármilyen olyan recepthez használható, amely ropogós felületet igényel, például kekszekhez. TIP:  Ahhoz, hogy a receptek ropogósra süljenek, a mikroperforált szőnyeget mikroperforált sütőlappal vagy grillsütővel együtt kell használni.
